76325.subject: Avalanche Is Entering an Infrastructure-Led Expansion Phase
76325.body:
View this post on the web at https://www.team1.blog/p/avalanche-is-entering-an-infrastructure

Avalanche is entering a different kind of growth phase.
The latest Nansen snapshot, covering June 12 to July 12, shows 87.8 million monthly transactions, 1.7 million active addresses and transaction costs that remain close to negligible. At the same time, BlackRock’s BUIDL fund reached $902.7 million on Avalanche, sAVAX continued accumulating within the BENQI staking system, and the economics of launching dedicated Avalanche L1s became significantly more accessible following Avalanche9000.
This is not primarily a retail-driven expansion built around memecoins, speculative trading or rapidly rising DEX activity. In fact, decentralized exchange volume remains one of the weaker areas of the current dataset. The stronger signals are appearing elsewhere: regulated tokenized assets, stablecoin positioning, liquid staking participation, lower infrastructure costs and specialized networks designed for specific financial or consumer markets.
That distinction matters because Avalanche is not simply processing more transactions. It is becoming infrastructure for larger, more specialized and more capital-intensive use cases. At one end, BlackRock’s BUIDL fund demonstrates the network’s ability to support institutional capital and tokenized financial products. At the other, FIFA Blockchain demonstrates how the same underlying architecture can support consumer experiences for a global audience.
The emerging Avalanche thesis is therefore broader than growth in a single metric. It is the development of an onchain infrastructure layer capable of supporting both regulated financial markets and mass-consumer applications.
Want to keep up with the latest in the Avalanche ecosystem? Subscribe to the Team1 blog and get our updates in your inbox weekly.
Network adoption is broadening
Avalanche added approximately 707,000 new C-Chain addresses during Q2 2026, compared with 118,000 during Q1. That represents nearly six times as many new addresses quarter over quarter. The latest monthly snapshot also shows 1.7 million active addresses and an estimated 87.8 million transactions across the network.
These figures suggest that Avalanche is reaching more users while preserving the low-cost environment required for payments, gaming, consumer applications and other forms of high-frequency onchain activity. According to the report, the median transaction fee is now close to $0.00001, following an estimated 96 percent reduction after recent network upgrades.
Low fees don’t automatically create adoption, but high fees guarantee failure for mainstream apps. When infrastructure gets this cheap and invisible, developers can focus on building actual products without forcing users to worry about gas markets.
The address data should still be interpreted carefully. A newly created wallet is not necessarily a retained user, and rising activity can include automated addresses, incenti

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: Füzérradvány Helyszín <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.

76323.subject: 👀 Anthropic changes how you use Claude
76323.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Anthropic added a way to teach Claude a task just by letting it watch you work, OpenAI admitted two of its models broke into Hugging Face to cheat on a hacking test, Google fired three new Gemini models at Anthropic including a cyber one and Substack is rolling out a tool to catch AI slop in your feed.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Anthropic:** What's the new way to use Claude?

* **OpenAI:** Why did its AI break into Hugging Face?

* **Google:** What did Google aim at Anthropic?

* **Substack:** How will it catch AI slop?


----------



----------
## [Claude can now learn a task by watching you do it once](https://x.com/claudeai/status/2079595988998554047)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/65dd50c1-bc29-4932-9cf4-8ea7f48a1e4e/Beehiiv_01_-_Jul_22.png?t=1784714425)
Caption: 

Anthropic added a new way to use Claude, and it doesn't involve typing a prompt.

You record your screen while you do a task, talk through what you're doing, and Claude turns that recording into a skill it can run again on its own.

It picks up the job the way a new hire would, by watching you do it once instead of reading a manual.

The pitch is the repetitive software stuff, editing a video or laying out a design. Show it a single time, then hand it off.

It stops short of full autopilot. You still point it at what matters, and the taste stays yours.

It's live now on Pro, Max and Team plans, under Record a skill in the desktop app's plus menu.


----------











----------
_Special highlight from the network_

[Make Claude Your 24/7 Second Brain in Just 16 Hours](https://link.genai.works/Jclj)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c1cffb6-7f83-4fa4-bdda-5777f655ee42/Outskill_July_22.JPG?t=1784714413)
Caption: 

Claude is the most powerful AI tool of 2026, with features like Skills, Connectors, Cowork, and vibe coding. But most people barely scratch the surface.

Our experts distilled **800+ hours** of research and real-world experience into a **16-hour live workshop** that teaches you how to unlock Claude's full potential alongside 10+ AI tools and workflows.

**You'll learn to:**

* Master Claude's Chat, Cowork, and Code modes

* Set up Skills, Connectors, and plug-ins to automate work

* Build apps and dashboards with vibe coding—no coding required

🧠 **Saturday & Sunday** | 🕙 **10 AM–7 PM EST**

**[Reserve your spot tod

76320.subject: Visa’s Stablecoin Platform launches with Open USD, sending Circle down 6% 😳🪙; Ramp’s free LLM Router isn’t the p…
76320.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1103

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Wednesday! Today, we’re diving into finance giant Visa, which just launched the Visa Stablecoin Platform to rival Circle (why Visa followed the same pattern Anthropic set with Claude Managed Agents [ https://substack.com/redirect/80d80f98-1656-475c-b1c1-7c225409a3b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], & what’s the bigger play here + bonus deep dives into Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/2bccca86-4263-4aea-97e7-b8e9829d08b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Circle [ https://substack.com/redirect/7039d116-4e7d-4200-a4c7-0b21223e9710?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and the Ultimate List of Stables Resources [ https://substack.com/redirect/5119fcc5-d5c3-4973-a2bb-7d7a1b9ecf2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), spend managemet giant Ramp that just unveiled Free LLM Router, which isn’t even the product (why the fintech giant started giving away free AI infrastructure & how it perfectly captures the AI Monopoly strategy [ https://substack.com/redirect/b952b420-be32-45d6-9b0b-d6bbd7603e8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] + bonus guide to building Agentic OS with Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/0732dea7-28c2-4d13-8d36-74687aa36edf?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and Nubank, which can now call itself a bank in Brazil (why NU spent pocket change for yet another licence in LatAm, why it’s important for their long-term strategy + bonus deep dive into FinTech funding trends from H1 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/d775abb4-f40a-4001-9af0-dec70c3916c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s jump straight into the finnovative stuff 🌶️
Visa’s Stablecoin Platform launches with Open USD, sending Circle down 6% 😳🪙
The news 🗞️ Last week, finance giant Visa $V  did what Visa does best: turned complex infrastructure into a managed service. It’s the same pattern Anthropic [ https://substack.com/redirect/ee266c6e-826a-41ce-a4c5-875d8d89919a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] set with Claude Managed Agents [ https://substack.com/redirect/80d80f98-1656-475c-b1c1-7c225409a3b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]: own the operational complexity, let your clients skip the buildout. Smart play 👏
The new Visa Stablecoin Platform now lets banks and fintechs mint, move, and manage stablecoins through Visa’s existing rails, starting with Open USD [ https://substack.com/redirect/fd650260-08fa-45cc-bae9-7d9cb090f634?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], the token backed by a 140-member consortium including BlackRock, Stripe, and Coinbase.
Circle’s stock dropped 6% the same day, C
